columns.name: pack_pressure
columns.description: Molding pack/hold pressure setting on a 0-10 operating scale used after cavity fill to densify the part.

columns.name: cavity_fill_time
columns.description: Inline sensor reading of how quickly the mold cavity reaches full fill, which shifts with flow behavior and material condition.

columns.name: clarity_seal_score
columns.description: Final combined quality score for optical clarity and seal integrity of the finished syringe barrel, where higher is better.

stakes.narrative: The syringe line believes higher pack_pressure improves barrel clarity and sealing, and historical batches seem to support that view. But the best runs also tended to happen when the resin was better dried, which changed flow and downstream quality at the same time. The plant suspects the records overstate what the pressure knob itself really buys.

functionals.name: exceedance
functionals.brief_clause: a scrap -- clarity_seal_score below the acceptance line of 16.8 -- is far costlier than a forgone gain

control_surface.deliverable_note: model(regime, n, seed) -> table over [pack_pressure, cavity_fill_time, clarity_seal_score].
